rag_rules: Repair only validator diagnostics related to the current target component
Use only visible identifiers from the current visible identifiers list
Move implementation-level guarantees to the implementation annex when appropriate
Delete invalid guarantees that cannot be repaired with visible identifiers
generic_rules: Use only valid AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use bool for comparison expressions, int for integer arithmetic, and real for real arithmetic
Place component type contracts in the component type annex and implementation-level bindings in the implementation annex
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value; for range checks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Place component type contracts in the component type annex and implementation-level bindings in the implementation annex
anti_patterns: Do not use package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not place implementation-level references or subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use identifiers not listed in the current visible identifiers list
